posts.author: Tahir01 (Khan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I think it would be useful to have the hour column on the Form view, where you can input a specific time, rather than having a free text field - it would make the form look much more refined. I’m creating accident report forms and with the QR code integration it will be a quicker method to get all the data back.

Thanks
